tasks.title: Align frontend API DTOs with backend contracts
tasks.description: Refactor frontend API modules so they correctly model the backend response wrappers and field names for agents, session history, session log, wallet, leaderboard, and related endpoints. Introduce raw DTO types where needed.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: listAgents models the wrapped backend response correctly
AC-2: getAgentHistory models the actual paginated response correctly
AC-3: getSessionLog matches the backend payload shape
AC-4: No explicit any remains in targeted API files
GATE: npm run lint no longer reports any in targeted API modules

tasks.title: Add frontend response normalization and view models
tasks.description: Introduce explicit normalization/mapping in src/api modules so pages consume stable frontend view models rather than backend DTOs directly. Standardize naming such as rivalName, sessionId, completedAt, and items across the UI layer.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Pages no longer need ad hoc payload-shape branching
AC-2: Frontend naming is consistent across view models
AC-3: DTO-to-view-model mapping is centralized in api modules
GATE: DashboardPage no longer accesses mixed backend field names

tasks.title: Refactor AuthContext and data-fetch pages to use typed API layer only
tasks.description: Update AuthContext, DashboardPage, LeaderboardPage, and related high-traffic pages so they stop calling raw client.get for domain data, consume typed API helpers only, and handle loading/error/empty states explicitly.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: DashboardPage uses API helpers instead of raw client.get for agent history
AC-2: Main pages expose explicit loading, error, and empty states
AC-3: Auth bootstrap flow remains typed and readable
GATE: No direct domain-level client.get calls remain in targeted pages

tasks.title: Fix polling and effect patterns to satisfy lint cleanly
tasks.description: Refactor fetch loops, effect bootstrap logic, and interval handling so the frontend complies with current react-hooks and react-refresh lint rules without suppressions or workaround patterns.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: No react-hooks/set-state-in-effect violations remain in targeted files
AC-2: Polling still refreshes dashboard and leaderboard data correctly
AC-3: No eslint-disable comments are introduced to bypass the rules
GATE: npm run lint no longer reports hook/effect violations

tasks.title: Restore frontend quality gates and remove silent failures
tasks.description: Finish the frontend refactor by removing empty catch blocks from main pages, surfacing user-visible error states where appropriate, and ensuring the frontend passes lint end to end.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: No empty catch blocks remain in targeted frontend pages
AC-2: User-visible fallback states exist for failed loads
AC-3: All targeted files pass eslint under the current config
GATE: npm run lint exits 0
